## C. ACCESSIBILITY WCAG 2.2 AA
### C.1 — HIGH — Skip link target missing
File: `index.html`
Line: 373
Found: `<a href="#main" class="skipto">`
Why: Broken skip links hurt keyboard users.
Fix for Claude: Add matching id to main or update href.

### C.2 — HIGH — Missing focus-visible CSS
File: `sitemap/index.html`
Line: 1
Found: `no :focus-visible`
Why: Keyboard users need visible focus.
Fix for Claude: Add visible focus outlines for links/buttons/forms.

### C.3 — HIGH — Button has no accessible name
File: `tools/bank-checker/index.html`
Line: 258
Found: `<button class="btn btn-primary" id="checkBtn">`
Why: Screen readers announce unnamed buttons poorly.
Fix for Claude: Add visible text or aria-label.

File: `tools/cost-calculator/index.html`

Found: `<button class="btn btn-primary" id="calcBtn" type="button">`

Fix for Claude: Add visible text or aria-label.

## E. MOBILE UX
All 184 production HTML pages were scanned for this category; no actionable finding was generated by the automated checks.

## F. DESKTOP UX
### F.1 — LOW — Long heading may create desktop widows/orphans
File: `professions/online-business-owner/index.html`
Line: 428
Found: `Pathway 4 — Privilege (the "do not want to optimise tax / just want to be left alone" option)`
Why: Long headings can wrap awkwardly.
Fix for Claude: Review line breaks or max-width; rewrite only with Tim approval.

### F.2 — LOW — No hover state detected on interactive elements
File: `tools/ltr-eligibility/index.html`
Line: 1
Found: `no :hover`
Why: Desktop affordance is weaker.
Fix for Claude: Add subtle hover states.

## G. SECURITY HEADERS + COOKIES
### G.1 — BLOCKER — Internal prompt/brief markdown file exists at production root
File: `CLAUDE_READ_THIS.md`
Line: 1
Found: `CLAUDE_READ_THIS.md`
Why: Root-level markdown may be publicly served by static hosting.
Fix for Claude: Move under _research or remove from deploy branch.

### G.2 — HIGH — CSP allows unsafe-inline
File: `_headers`
Line: 11
Found: `'unsafe-inline'`
Why: Weakens XSS protection; may be required by inline no-build site.
Fix for Claude: Document necessity or plan nonce/hash/static migration.

Line: 1

### G.5 — MEDIUM — CSP allows CDN script origins not used by no-framework site
File: `_headers`
Line: 11
Found: `Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'se`
Why: Unused origins expand attack surface.
Fix for Claude: Remove after verifying no page uses them.

### J.1 — HIGH — CSS variable used but not defined on page

Why: Undefined CSS variables can collapse styles.
Fix for Claude: Define variable in :root or replace with existing variable.

### J.2 — HIGH — CSS variable used but not defined on page
File: `404.html`
Line: 268
Found: `var(--ry)`

### J.4 — LOW — Vendor-prefixed CSS present
File: `404.html`
Line: 36
Found: `-webkit-*`
Why: Prefix-only CSS can fail elsewhere.
Fix for Claude: Ensure unprefixed standard property is present.

### J.5 — LOW — High z-index without stack rationale
File: `404.html`
Line: 45
Found: `z-index:200`
Why: Can collide with fixed chrome.
Fix for Claude: Use smallest needed z-index or document stack.

### J.6 — LOW — Non-standard responsive breakpoint used
File: `404.html`
Line: 230
Found: `@media (min-width:1400px`
Why: Inconsistent breakpoints create CSS drift.
Fix for Claude: Use established 640/760/1024 unless documented.

### J.721 — LOW — High z-index without stack rationale
File: `visas/smart/index.html`
Line: 154
Found: `z-index:9999`
Why: Can collide with fixed chrome.
Fix for Claude: Use smallest needed z-index or document stack.

### J.722 — LOW — CSS uses !important
File: `visas/smart/index.html`
Line: 157
Found: `*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:0.01ms !important;animation-iteration-count:1 !important;transition-duration:0.01ms !important;scroll-behavior:auto !important}`
Why: Harder to maintain/override.
Fix for Claude: Remove by clarifying selector or order.

### J.723 — LOW — Non-standard responsive breakpoint used
File: `visas/smart/index.html`
Line: 220
Found: `@media (max-width:400px`
Why: Inconsistent breakpoints create CSS drift.
Fix for Claude: Use established 640/760/1024 unless documented.
